globalNews.title: Iran warns Israeli attacks in Lebanon threaten ceasefire with US
globalNews.summary: Earlier Israel's PM ordered strikes on Beirut's southern suburbs in response to Hezbollah rocket and drone attacks on northern Israel.

globalNews.title: Bowen: Trump needs this war to end but Iran is not backing down
globalNews.summary: Under pressure from the polls and Gulf allies, the White House is pushing for a deal but Iran wants concessions, writes BBC's international editor.

globalNews.title: Three Ebola vaccines in development amid growing outbreak fears
globalNews.summary: IAVI, Moderna and the University of Oxford are all working on new vaccines.

globalNews.title: AI giant Anthropic says it plans to list on US stock market
globalNews.summary: The AI company behind Claude is set to offer the public shares of stock sometime this year.

globalNews.title: Hungarian PM threatens to oust Orbán-era president
globalNews.summary: Hungary's president has refused Prime Minister Péter Magyar's demands to step aside, setting up a constitutional clash.

cryptoNews.title: Are Ethereum OGs jumping ship? Here's what the data says
cryptoNews.summary: Long-term whales have cashed out millions of dollars from Ethereum following the recent sell-off, potentially putting ETH at risk of further losses.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Hyperliquid's HYPE breakout puts $100 price target in play
cryptoNews.summary: HYPE has entered the breakout stage of its prevailing bull pennant setup with an upside target near $105, with strong fundamentals backing the bullish case.

cryptoNews.title: Recovery hopes fade as Kelp DAO hacker launders nearly all $220M in stolen funds
cryptoNews.summary: The Kelp DAO exploiter laundered about $220 million worth of remaining stolen funds in a bid to make them untraceable, excluding the $71 million frozen by Arbitrum’s Security Council.

cryptoNews.title: Strategy sells 32 BTC in first Bitcoin sale since 2022; Stock falls on open
cryptoNews.summary: The world's largest public Bitcoin holder reduced its stash to 843,706 BTC, while raising $128.3 million through Class A stock sales.

aiNews.title: Water access is now a risk factor in SpaceX’s IPO
aiNews.summary: The company says it needs "significant" water resources to cool its data centers, and that access to abundant, affordable water is a challenge.

aiNews.title: Anthropic files to go public
aiNews.summary: The company said Monday it has filed confidentially for an IPO.

aiNews.title: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies
aiNews.summary: Windborne Systems' newest weather forecasting model beats the best government predictions by days.

aiNews.title: DuckDuckGo makes its ‘no-AI’ search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
aiNews.summary: Alternative search engine DuckDuckGo launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox users.

aiNews.title: Erin Brockovich takes aim at data center secrecy
aiNews.summary: Environmental activist Erin Brockovich has a new mission.
